info.title: Order Time REST API
info.description: Order Time is a powerful inventory control and order management platform. The REST API allows creating, modifying, deleting, and querying records including customers, items, quotes, sales orders, and ship docs.

200.description: List of Sales order line items

post.summary: Create a Sales order line item

get.summary: Get a Sales order line item

put.summary: Update a Sales order line item

delete.summary: Delete a Sales order line item

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: API key obtained from company Master Admin
